channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Controversial Democrat who called for 'Zionists' to be imprisoned toppled after backlash
item.description: A Texas Democrat facing accusations of antisemitism after calling for imprisoning Zionists is challenged by Johnny Garcia in the TX-35 primary runoff.

item.title: Democratic Socialist Chris Rabb Will Be the Most Radical Member of Congress
Trump-backed Air Force veteran wins GOP runoff in newly-redistricted House district
item.description: Trump-endorsed Carlos de la Cruz defeated Texas lawmaker John Lujan in a runoff for a redrawn congressional district stretching from Austin...

item.title: Another Vapid Hollywood Leftie Comes After Spencer Pratt — but He's Ready With the Killer Response
